meaning: n.(中美洲和西印度群岛的)四弦吉他
examples: "Now we need to calm down a little because squads usually have around 25 players and ours now has some 35," Perez told Spanish television station Cuatro.
Soon they organized the "Marcha de los Cuatro Suyos" which created a tense situation.
To find out, I spent the night in Cuatro, a shanty town in Manila.
El primer conjunto es el de Unianga Kebir, que cuenta con cuatro lagos.
